tasks.subject: Task 0: Server — couldHavePlayed payload enrichment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** submitMovie's H3 invalid-connection branch attaches an optional, best-effort, fail-closed `couldHavePlayed: { title, year }` to the existing youWereEliminated payload, reusing botSystem.generateBotMove read-only.

**Files:**
- Modify: server/systems/matchSystem.js (COULD_HAVE_PLAYED_TIMEOUT_MS + SUGGESTION_BOT_PROFILE constants; _computeCouldHavePlayed helper above resolveCandidates; await+spread it into the H3 socket.emit)
- Test: server/systems/matchSystem.test.js (extend the existing H3 describe with 4 tests: present / null / throws / unresolved)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] couldHavePlayed:{title,year} present when generateBotMove yields a resolvable move
- [ ] omitted on null / throw / unresolved / timeout; all existing H3 assertions still pass
- [ ] no change to bot/validation/scoring/non-H3 paths; WHY comments on changed lines

**Verify:** npx jest server --runInBand -t "youWereEliminated" → existing + 4 new pass; then npx jest --runInBand → both projects green, coverage floors held

**Steps:** write 4 failing tests in H3 describe → confirm fail → add 2 module constants → add _computeCouldHavePlayed (lazy require botSystem, generateBotMove with whiff:0 profile + rng:()=>0, resolveCandidates direct-ID resolve, Promise.race timeout, try/catch→null) → await + conditional-spread into the youWereEliminated payload → green → full suite → commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/matchSystem.js", "server/systems/matchSystem.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server --runInBand -t \"youWereEliminated\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["couldHavePlayed present when pathfinder finds a resolvable move", "omitted fail-closed on null/throw/unresolved/timeout with existing H3 assertions intact", "no bot/validation/scoring/non-H3 change; WHY comments"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Client — render the suggestion + style + test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The detailed self-elimination card additively renders the couldHavePlayed movie beneath the cast comparison; absent ⇒ card byte-identical to today.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js (detailed path of showSelfEliminationScreen: build optional couldEl, append between grid and hint)
- Modify: public/css/06-states-anim.css (append one additive .self-elim-could rule; no existing selector touched)
- Test: client-tests/learning-breakdown.test.js (new; 3 tests: present / absent-unchanged / legacy-no-details)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] .self-elim-could renders with title (+ (year) when non-empty) when details.couldHavePlayed.title present
- [ ] absent ⇒ no .self-elim-could, detailed card otherwise unchanged; legacy flash unchanged
- [ ] CSS additive only (no existing rule modified); WHY comments

**Verify:** npx jest client --runInBand -t "learning breakdown" → 3 pass; then npx jest --runInBand → both projects green, coverage floors held

**Steps:** create client-tests/learning-breakdown.test.js (jsdom, import showSelfEliminationScreen from ../public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js, fake timers, 3 tests) → confirm fail → add optional couldEl block after the two grid buildColumn appends → append `if (couldEl) card.appendChild(couldEl)` between grid and hint → append additive .self-elim-could CSS → green → full suite → commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js", "public/css/06-states-anim.css", "client-tests/learning-breakdown.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client --runInBand -t \"learning breakdown\"", "acceptanceCriteria": [".self-elim-could renders title (+year) when couldHavePlayed present", "absent ⇒ no block, detailed+legacy paths byte-unchanged", "CSS additive-only; WHY comments"]}
```
